jsonLd.title: ICRA is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
ICRA is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Agra. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About ICRA:
ICRA is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICRA!
